figures.caption: Fig. 1. A representative multi-tier network architecture. The system is organized hierarchically across six layers, including cloud servers at Layer 5, satellites at Layer 4, regional servers at Layer 3, macro base stations and a high-altitude platform at Layer 2, small base stations and drones at Layer 1, and end-user devices and sensors at Layer 0. In architecture-aware networked AI, the learning system should follow such structure rather than assume a one-size-fits-all topology.
